excerpt: Turn re-rentals into a seamless part of your operations. RentalResult integrates directly with RentalMan, so you can source equipment from major rental houses as easily as pulling from your own fleet.

Comprehensive Cross-Hire management functionality provides you full visibility and control of all equipment brought in from other suppliers. Easily assign default suppliers and purchase prices for each category of equipment, ensuring you always get the right equipment at the best price. You can monitor ongoing and overall costs to ensure you are never overcharged for Cross-Hire equipment.
What begins as a single request quickly becomes a set of decisions: is the asset already available internally, can it be transferred, should it be re-rented, or does it justify a purchase?
